title: Master Claude Code with Claude Fable 5 (57 mins)
summary: Keith AI's 57-minute video demonstrates advanced use of Claude Code as a coding system rather than a chat interface. The video covers Desktop, CLI, and web modes, permissions, connectors, slash commands, plugins, routines, sub-agents, and dynamic workflows for building apps and automating development workflows.
writeup: Keith AI's 57-minute video treats Claude Code as a coding system rather than a chat interface, working across Desktop, CLI, and web modes. It walks through permissions, connectors, slash commands, plugins, routines, sub-agents, and dynamic workflows for building apps and automating development tasks. The framing matters because it shifts Claude Code from one-off prompting toward configurable, agentic pipelines. Key takeaways include how the three modes differ and how sub-agents and routines combine to structure repeatable development work.
